_about.purpose: Lane-ownership / MECE coverage manifest (agent-authoring-standard.md, Part C, G8/G9/G11). Declares each agent's exclusive lane and its named handoffs to the sibling that owns each adjacent concern.
_about.owns: Each agent's 'owns' is the set of canonical case-identities sha1(method+path+recipe.kind+sorted(params)+assertion-signature) computed BY THE MECE GATE from the agent's emitted plan on the canonical brief. It is seeded empty here and refreshed per agent on each build/update. Do not hand-write hashes.
_about.status: seed-v1 — lanes and handoffs declared for the api-tester group (the test-surface owners the MECE invariant governs). 'owns' pending mece_gate.py, which is not yet present in the foundry.
notes: code-review/* agents are single-lens reviewers; they emit {rating,notes}, not test-case plans, so they own no test-surface case-identities and are not part of this case-identity partition.
Remove agent-foundry/agents/api-tester/_updated-drafts/ before any discover_agents/MECE pass — those flat draft files duplicate the api-tester-* names.

api-tester/test-authentication-flows.lane: First-party credential validity — login / identity / token-refresh lifecycle (valid, missing, malformed, expired, revoked; login success/wrong-password/unknown-user/missing-fields/lockout; JWT tampering; Authorization-header malformation; api-key location).

api-tester/check-authorization-rules.lane: Authorization / access control on protected resources — RBAC, owner-positive, cross-tenant IDOR, privilege-escalation / mass-assignment, with per-case field+substring leakage assertions.

api-tester/verify-crud-operation-integri.lane: Hard CRUD lifecycle integrity — ordered create/read/update/patch/delete with field-echo, list membership, negative lifecycle (update/delete-missing 404, duplicate 409), and database-state verification at each step.

api-tester/test-idempotency-of-endpoints.lane: Sequential idempotency — PUT/DELETE/GET replays under one Idempotency-Key with stable server-managed fields, create primary+fresh key dedupe, and same-key-different-body conflict.

api-tester/test-soft-delete-behavior.lane: Soft-delete semantics — delete markers, post-delete visibility / non-persistence, restore, double-delete, update-on-deleted, unique-key reuse, cascade, DB row survival within tolerance.

api-tester/validate-search-and-filter-qu.lane: Search and filter semantics — keyword/substring search, category/range/multi-value filters, invalid-value, unknown-parameter, empty-result, injection-safety, every-record-matches and count-equals-DB.

api-tester/test-pagination-behavior.lane: Pagination page math — first/middle/last/beyond-last pages, default size, oversize cap, page metadata (total/limit/offset or Link), zero overlap and zero gaps across pages, invalid page params.

api-tester/validate-query-parameter-hand.lane: Generic query-parameter mechanics — missing-required, wrong-type coercion, valid single, undocumented-ignored, multi-value, comma-list, URL-encoding, default-application, name-case, duplicate-key.

api-tester/validate-request-payloads.lane: Request-body constraints — missing-required, wrong-type, extra field, string-length boundaries, format/pattern, numeric range, array, nested-object — across create/update/patch bodies.

api-tester/validate-null-empty-fields.lane: Null/empty/absent request-body states (sole owner) — per-field absent/json-null/empty-string/zero/false/empty-array/empty-object/whitespace, all/each/combo-required-null, string-"null", nested and array-element nulls.

api-tester/verify-response-status-codes.lane: Generic status-code conformance — 200, 201, 202, 204, 301/302, 400, 404, 405, 409, 410, 422, 500 (the codes no dedicated agent owns).

api-tester/verify-error-message-clarity.lane: Error-response clarity — clear human-readable message, machine-readable code, consistent error envelope, field-level validation detail, status↔code alignment, request-id, zero internal-detail leak.

api-tester/verify-enum-value-restriction.lane: Request-body enum membership — each valid enum value accepted; unknown-string/empty-string/null/wrong-type/case-variant/numeric/array-multiselect/whitespace-padded/unicode-lookalike rejected.

api-tester/validate-json-schema-response.lane: Response-body schema conformance — every documented response code's body validated with ajv under strict rules (additionalProperties:false, required+typed fields, list-item validation, application/json content-type).

api-tester/validate-header-propagation.lane: Generic request-header forwarding — Authorization, W3C traceparent/tracestate, B3, X-Forwarded-*, one custom header reach downstream unmodified; hop-by-hop headers stripped; inbound traceparent continued.

api-tester/test-rate-limit-enforcement.lane: Rate-limit enforcement — at-limit burst, over-limit throttle, window reset, per-key isolation, limit scope, RateLimit-Limit/Remaining/Reset header decrement.

api-tester/verify-content-type-negotiati.lane: Content negotiation — Accept per supported media type, 406 unsupported, wildcard, charset, q-value preference, Accept-Encoding; request Content-Type accepted/415, missing Content-Type, charset-in-Content-Type.

api-tester/validate-api-versioning-behav.lane: API versioning — path / header-media-type / query versioning; current (no Deprecation), deprecated (Deprecation+Sunset+successor Link), unsupported (404/400); default-version; per-version schema validation.

api-tester/test-webhook-delivery.lane: HTTP-callback webhook delivery — register/trigger/poll; payload + ISO timestamp + HMAC signature; event filtering; multi-retry backoff; dead-letter after max; non-retryable 4xx; tamper-negative.

api-tester/test-timeout-handling.lane: Timeout behaviour — injected upstream delay yields gateway timeout within max_wait with a safe error body and recovery; slow-client/slowloris; connect-vs-read distinction; retry-on-timeout.

api-tester/test-concurrent-request-handl.lane: Concurrency races — N concurrent identical reads; N concurrent unique writes verified in DB (count delta, zero dup, zero missing); concurrent update optimistic-lock; concurrent same-unique-key; zero 500s.

api-tester/verify-sorting-behavior.lane: Ordering — ascending/descending by string/numeric/timestamp, multi-field secondary with stability, null ordering, collation/case, sort+pagination interaction, invalid-sort-field and invalid-order 400.

api-tester/verify-third-party-oauth-inte.lane: Third-party OAuth2 authorization-code flow — redirect/code-receipt/token-exchange/userinfo/refresh stages plus CSRF-state, bad-redirect-uri, replayed/expired code, wrong client_secret, PKCE mismatch, denied-consent negatives.

api-tester/validate-correlation-id-propa.lane: Correlation-ID semantics (sole owner) — exact echo, propagation to API + downstream logs, no-header UUIDv4 auto-generation, uniqueness across requests, id-in-error, malformed-id reject/sanitize.

api-tester/verify-caching-headers.lane: Caching headers — Cache-Control/ETag, If-None-Match 304, If-Modified-Since 304, Vary, If-Match 412, post-update ETag change, max-age freshness, mutation no-store.

api-tester/test-event-driven-api-trigger.lane: Broker/topic event semantics — well-formed event drives state in window; malformed event ERROR-logged + dead-lettered + state-unchanged + consumer-healthy; duplicate idempotent; out-of-order; poison-retry then DLQ.

api-tester/verify-audit-log-generation.lane: Audit-log semantics — create/update/delete entries with required fields and window/tolerance, read-audit, failed-action audit, login/logout audit, before/after on update, immutability.

api-tester/test-api-gateway-routing.lane: Gateway routing correctness — request reaches exactly the correct single backend unchanged, other backends untouched; path-rewrite; unknown-route 404; method-not-allowed; load-balancing/weighting; injected X-Forwarded-*/X-Request-ID; service-down 503.

api-tester/validate-retry-after-header-c.lane: Retry-After header (sole owner) — 429 and 503 carrying Retry-After, both integer-seconds and RFC 7231 HTTP-date forms, deadline-anchored honoring, sanity bound.

api-tester/validate-graphql-depth-limits.lane: GraphQL query-protection — depth (accept / at-limit / one-over reject / deep timed reject), complexity/cost, alias amplification, fragment-cycle, introspection policy, batched-query cap.

api-tester/test-long-polling-support.lane: Long-poll transport — no-event 204-empty within window, event 200-within-2s with correct type, multiple-events queued, resume-after-gap via Last-Event-ID, concurrent-pollers, connection-drop.

api-tester/test-file-upload-and-download.lane: File handling and security — size limits (incl. 0-byte and over-max), MIME, magic-byte-vs-declared-MIME mismatch, path-traversal filename, byte-for-byte MD5 download round-trip, download-404, download-authorization.

api-tester/test-multipart-form-data-hand.lane: Multipart encoding mechanics — text+file parts, returned-file-URL field, MD5 round-trip, persisted readback, multi-file array, part-without-filename, duplicate field, field-order independence, malformed boundary.

api-tester/track-defect-density.lane: Defect-density reporting (pure calculator over the brief) — density per 1000 changed lines (test-files excluded), severity-weighted density, per-area densities, rolling 3-sprint average, deviation %, alert flag, P1–P4 counts, trend.

api-tester/test-ip-allowlist-enforcement.lane: IP-allowlist enforcement — allowlisted 200, non-allowlisted 403, X-Forwarded-For spoof 403, CIDR/subnet, IPv6, multi-hop XFF trusted-proxy depth, denylist precedence, allowlist add/remove via management API.

api-tester/run-regression-suite.lane: Regression-suite reporting (pure two-artifact comparator, no execution) — JUnit/Jest/pytest/TAP/TRX-NUnit: total, prev-passed, regressions, newly-passing, flaky, slowed, overall status.

api-tester/test-ssl-tls-enforcement.lane: TLS enforcement — protocol probes (plain HTTP + TLS1.0/1.1 reject, TLS1.2/1.3 accept), certificate assertions incl. OCSP, HSTS, forward-secrecy/cipher-order, forbidden weak-cipher families, SNI/wildcard.

api-tester/test-bulk-operation-endpoints.lane: Bulk/batch operations — all-valid, mixed 207-Multi-Status with offending-field naming, all-invalid, empty, single-item, duplicate-within-batch, oversize reject, atomicity rollback, bulk-update/delete, DB delta.

api-tester/measure-api-consumer-satisfac.lane: Consumer-satisfaction measurement plan (plan-only over a local fixture) — NPS+CSAT+CES, recipient/collection windows, bands, NPS formula, validity threshold, per-segment, quarter-over-quarter trend, themes clustering, dashboard fields.
